{{/* Build directory crumbs from the file path. Drop the current page itself — the h1 already names it, so listing it in the breadcrumb just repeats. */}} {{ $ctx := . }} {{ $rel := "" }} {{ if .File }}{{ $rel = .File.Path }}{{ end }} {{ $segments := slice }} {{ if ne $rel "" }} {{ $dir := path.Dir $rel }} {{ $segments = cond (ne $dir ".") (split $dir "/") (slice) }} {{ end }} {{/* Only render the breadcrumb when there is real hierarchy to show. */}} {{ if gt (len $segments) 0 }}
  1. Durababble
    2. {{ $acc := "" }} {{ range $i, $seg := $segments }} {{ $acc = printf "%s%s/" $acc $seg }} {{ $accTrim := strings.TrimSuffix "/" $acc }} {{ $section := $ctx.Site.GetPage "section" $accTrim }} {{ if $section }}
  2. {{ replace $seg `-` ` ` | title }}
    3. {{ else }}
  3. {{ replace $seg `-` ` ` | title }}
    4. {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
